title: Palmijuncus tetrastichus
taxonomy: Palmijuncus tetrastichus is a species of wasp in the family Figitidae. It is a parasitoid wasp that primarily targets the larvae of various insects. The classification of Palmijuncus tetrastichus is within the kingdom Animalia, phylum Arthropoda, and class Insecta. At the order and family levels, it belongs to Hymenoptera and Figitidae, respectively. This classification allows for a clear understanding of the wasp's relationships within the insect world.
